title: Create: Industry
description: A modpack that focuses on factories, transportation, and building, all with Create.
body:
This modpack focuses on automating EVERYTHING, (Almost) using the Create mod and it addons, as well as a lot of QOL mods, plus some extras.

# Features ##
- Create 0.5 automation,
- Boats and Flying things,
- Everything can be automated with Create,
- Beer and wine making,
- Oil,
- Many, many, new building blocks, from chisel + twigs, and much more,
- Blue stuff,
- Lots of furniture,
- SPACE!
- New economy system,
- FISH!!!!!!!!!!
- AND much more!



# CREDIT
[Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), along with the Create name is the work of Simbubi, and the Create team. To go to the page please click the link.

[Aquaculture](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture) is created by Shadowclaimr. To go to the page please click the link.

## *<NOTE>*
As of now, complete automation has not been finished, despite that, a majority of items can be obtained with farms.
